articles.title: Shiba Inu Insider Explains Why SHIB Is Ready For Multi-Billion-Dollar Inflows From ‘SHIB ETFs’
articles.description: The debate over whether Shiba Inu (SHIB) is ready for an exchange-traded fund (ETF) continues to gain traction in the crypto space.

articles.title: PumpSwap DEX crosses $10 billion in cumulative volume 10 days after launch
articles.description: Other Solana-based DEXs, such as Raydium, Meteora, and Whirlpool, are facing declining market share as Pump. fun's native DEX grows.

articles.title: Is ETH Dead as an Investment? Analysts Weigh In
articles.description: Market analysts say the endless creation of tokens and layer-2 networks on Ethereum have contributed to ether's underperformance as an investment.

articles.title: Hoskinson Reveals Cardano’s Push to Integrate with Dogecoin, Chainlink, Bitcoin
articles.description: Cardano founder Charles Hoskinson has revealed ongoing efforts to integrate with major blockchain ecosystems, including Dogecoin, Chainlink, and Bitcoin, that could expand Cardano’s reach and use cases. Speaking during a Friday interview with Gokhshtein Media, Hoskinson disclosed that discussions with Chainlink co-founder Sergey Nazarov are progressing, however, emphasizing that integration will take time due to technical challenges. […]
